custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged text comes from the author’s prose; no quoted language was treated as author bias.

custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels used (e.g., 'Labeling/Framing Bias', 'Selection/Omission Bias', 'Source Bias') are outside the defined set and misapplied relative to the accepted categories.
